levels.title: Foundations
levels.description: Pre-algebra, Python arithmetic, functions, and graphs.

levels.title: Algebra and Computational Thinking
levels.description: Linear equations, number systems, coding primitives, and basic proofs.

levels.title: Calculus and Optimization
levels.description: Derivatives, chain rule, extrema, roots, gradient descent, and differential equations.

levels.title: Linear Algebra and Data Geometry
levels.description: Vectors, matrices, transformations, elimination, and pseudoinverse methods.

levels.title: Algorithms
levels.description: Search, sorting, recursion, graphs, hash tables, and complexity.

levels.title: Classical Machine Learning
levels.description: Clustering, regression, validation, KNN, Naive Bayes, and decision trees.

levels.title: Neural Networks
levels.description: Logistic units, forward propagation, backpropagation, and convolution basics.

levels.title: Game AI and Capstones
levels.description: Minimax, self-play, neuroevolution, and open-ended expert projects.
